Systematic review and meta-analysis of 13 RCTs; documents significant reductions in blood glucose, total cholesterol, and triglycerides with buckwheat consumption
2023 peer-reviewed review; comprehensive nutritional profile, bioactive compounds (rutin, fagopyritols), documented anti-inflammatory, antidiabetic, hepatoprotective, and neuroprotective effects
